title: allionia coccinea
intro: Allionia coccinea, also known as redstem storksbill or Allionia, is a plant species in the mallow family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce swelling and pain. The health benefits of Allionia coccinea include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Allionia coccinea can be made into teas, salves, and tinctures for topical application, and can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
